Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Respondent Sabrina Jaquary Corbett, appears in Pro Per; no appearance by Pro Per Appellant, Michael Jones. Judge David Porter, addresses Ms. Corbett, and informs her that due to no appearance by the appellant, the Court will uphold the orignal judgment.
